events.title: The Wizard of Oz — Spring Musical (Opening Night)
events.location: Woodside High Auditorium, 150 Education Drive, Woodside, CA 94062
events.description: Woodside High School Drama Department presents THE WIZARD OF OZ. Show date: Friday, April 3, 2026 at 7:00 PM. Doors open 30 minutes before showtime. Concessions available at intermission. Tickets: Adults $15; Students/Seniors $10; Children under 5 free. Purchase online: woodsidedrama.org/tickets or at the door (cash/card accepted).
